description_long: This is a small, single-engine, fixed-wing airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft is predominantly white with blue and gray accent stripes, and features roundels and insignia on the wings and tail, suggesting a military or training role. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the vertical fin displaying additional insignia. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for light aviation or training purposes.
description: A compact, single-engine, low-wing airplane with a white body, blue accents, and military-style insignia, featuring a tricycle landing gear and enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the low-wing configuration, propeller at the nose, and detailed tail insignia.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing placement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wing roundel, landing gear, and streamlined fuselage.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the tricycle landing gear layout.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or dual seat.
